problem id: e5a5fdef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00000001 -> 00000100
  01111111 -> 11000011
  10011100 -> 00111110
  10010011 -> 00000101
  11100011 -> 11111101
  11100101 -> 11100110
  00001001 -> 00100000
  01100110 -> 10101011

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 11001011
